documents.topic: Whether the dormant Memory.Cursor → Sequenceable bridge can be revived: re-investigation of the associated-type-witness demangle/emission defect on current toolchains (Swift 6.3.2 / 6.4-dev / 6.5-dev).
documents.statusDetail: Not fixed through 6.5-dev 2026-05-12-a; lazy-Memory.Cursor revival not feasible; snapshot reshape is the available dedup path; per-type scalar workaround stays. Upstream filing gated on separate authorization.
